description: CLI interface -- Commander-based CLI with render, validate, and preview commands. Argument parsing for manifest path, output path, resolution overrides, fps overrides, verbose/debug mode. Output options (progress reporting, timing stats). Entry point at src/cli.ts.
notes: Tier 4 interface. Spec complete. Three commands: render, validate, preview (stub). Uses Commander with exitOverride for testability. Registry population centralized in src/cli/registry-init.ts (synchronous, static imports). Short flags: -W for width, -H for height (avoiding -h conflict with --help). Progress on stderr, results on stdout. SIGINT two-stage: graceful then force-kill.
